# Pull Request Template

## Description
Briefly describe the changes in this PR.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Related Issue(s)
Closes #(issue number)

## Testing
Describe the testing you've done:
- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Integration tests pass
- [ ] Manual testing completed
- [ ] Security review passed

## Security Checklist
- [ ] No secrets or credentials committed
- [ ] Input validation performed
- [ ] SQL injection prevention verified
- [ ] CORS/authentication checks included
- [ ] Third-party dependencies reviewed

## Backend Changes (if applicable)
- [ ] Database migrations created
- [ ] Environment variables documented
- [ ] API documentation updated
- [ ] Celery tasks updated (if applicable)

## Frontend Changes (if applicable)
- [ ] UI/UX tested on multiple screen sizes
- [ ] Accessibility checked
- [ ] Performance impact reviewed
- [ ] Platform-specific testing done (iOS/Android)

## Deployment Notes
- Breaking changes: N/A
- Database migrations: N/A
- Configuration changes: N/A
- Service restarts required: N/A

## Checklist
- [ ] Code follows project style guidelines
- [ ] Self-review completed
- [ ] Comments added for complex logic
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] No new warnings generated
- [ ] Tests added and passing
- [ ] Dependencies updated if needed
